- **ASPA** — [Theory](2sem/ASPA/index.html) · [Projects](2sem/ASPA/projects.html)
- **LCPB** — [Theory](2sem/LCPB/index.html) · [Projects](2sem/LCPB/projects.html)
- **MAPDB** — [Theory](2sem/MAPDB/index.html) · [Projects](2sem/MAPDB/projects.html)
- **PCN** — [Theory](2sem/PCN/index.html) · [Projects](2sem/PCN/projects.html)
